case_title: WILLIAM WERTZ VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $451.98 FILED BY WERTZ, WILLIAM AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-11-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-11-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-11-2025 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DOLORES BASTIAN DALTON. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF WILLIAM WERTZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT. SERVICE IS WAIVED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-11-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WERTZ, WILLIAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO $451.98 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $451.98 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
